<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Oral contraception</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>candidiasis（98.8%）</li>
<li>antithrombin deficiency type 2（98.5%）</li>
<li>heparin cofactor 2 deficiency（98.5%）</li>
<li>factor 5 excess with spontaneous thrombosis（98.5%）</li>
<li>plasma cell myeloma（97.8%）</li>
<li>gout（97.6%）</li>
<li>indolent plasma cell myeloma（97.5%）</li>
<li>heart neoplasm（97.4%）</li>
<li>thrombotic disease（97.4%）</li>
<li>rheumatoid arthritis（97.4%）</li>
<li>thrombophilia（97.3%）</li>
<li>cardiovascular disease（97.2%）</li>
<li>oral candidiasis（97.2%）</li>
<li>conjunctivitis（97.1%）</li>
<li>polyp of vocal cord（97.1%）</li>
<li>polyp of middle ear（97.1%）</li>
<li>Bacteroidaceae infectious disease（97.1%）</li>
<li>uterine polyp（97.1%）</li>
<li>leprosy（97.1%）</li>
<li>polyp of frontal sinus（97.0%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
